title: VC / PE due diligence: data-room synthesis
pain_description: 1,000+ docs per data room; associate spends 2 weeks reading; key risks missed; IC deadline rules.
santifer_pattern: Data-room drop + per-folder RAG agent + risk taxonomy + IC memo draft
why_now: Long-context LLMs + embeddings reliable on 1K+ page docs

title: M&A diligence: contract anomaly detection
pain_description: Review 500 customer contracts for change-of-control, non-compete, MFN, assignability. Junior lawyers burn out.
incumbent_gap: Old-gen NLP; new LLMs better + cheaper
santifer_pattern: Contract corpus + clause extractor agent + anomaly vs. playbook + red-flag list

title: KYB (Know Your Business) for B2B payments / lending
persona: Compliance ops at B2B payment / SMB lender
pain_description: New merchant signup → UBO docs, incorporation, sanctions lists, adverse media. 3-7d latency; onboarding drop-off.
incumbent_gap: Doc collection good; UBO reasoning + adverse media synthesis weak
santifer_pattern: Agent pulls registry + UBO traversal + sanctions + adverse media + reasoned risk memo

title: AML / transaction monitoring: false-positive flood
pain_description: 95%+ of alerts are false positives; analyst reviews dozens/day; genuine SAR missed.
incumbent_gap: Rule engines noisy; LLM reasoning context-thin
santifer_pattern: Alert + full customer context agent + auto-dismiss clear cases + SAR draft for real
reference_build: Lyzr — bank saved 30,000+ hrs on AML compliance

title: Sanctions screening + adverse media ongoing monitoring
pain_description: PEP lists refresh weekly; adverse media global; match review manual; miss = regulatory action.
incumbent_gap: Data access priced high; match-review human
santifer_pattern: Watchlist ingest + news ingest + name-match + LLM reasoning on false/true positive

title: SOC 2 / ISO 27001 audit prep: evidence collection
persona: Security / GRC lead at B2B SaaS
pain_description: Audit season = 200+ evidence items collected from 15 tools; screenshots in Dropbox; re-done yearly.
incumbent_gap: Collection UI good; reasoning over gaps weak
santifer_pattern: Integrate to tools + continuous evidence + gap-explainer agent + auditor-ready report

title: Vendor security questionnaire responses (SIG, CAIQ)
pain_description: Customers send 300-question SIG/CAIQ; engineer fills manually; each sale delayed a week.
santifer_pattern: Past-answer RAG + policy/doc RAG + LLM question answerer + reviewer workflow

title: Data Subject Access Requests (DSAR) under GDPR/CCPA
persona: Privacy / DPO at SaaS or retailer
pain_description: User asks for all data; team hunts across 20 systems; 30-day deadline; fines for misses.
santifer_pattern: Connectors + identity resolution + extract/redact agent + audit log

title: Contract lifecycle (CLM) for mid-market SaaS
pain_description: MSA/DPA/NDA redlines bounce for weeks; playbook ignored; sales blames legal.
santifer_pattern: Playbook-as-prompts + redline agent + escalation for off-playbook + e-sign
reference_build: a16z hybrid AI law firms (MSAs, DPAs, NDAs)

title: Immigration case management (visa/H-1B/green card)
pain_description: RFEs, deadlines, doc collection span months; missed dates = denied case.
incumbent_gap: Old UX; no AI drafting of petitions
santifer_pattern: Case timeline + RFE drafter + doc-request agent via WhatsApp/email

title: Personal injury case intake + medical record retrieval
pain_description: Caller describes accident; intake qualifies; medical records requested from 5 providers. Weeks.
incumbent_gap: Law practice mgmt; not AI intake
santifer_pattern: Voice intake + case score + auto HIPAA release + provider-request agent

title: Estate planning: doc generation per state
pain_description: Wills/trusts/POA vary per state; attorneys type same boilerplate; clients pay $3K+ for standard cases.
santifer_pattern: Client intake + state-rules + doc gen + attorney review agent

title: Regulatory reporting for fintechs (1099, FINRA, SEC)
pain_description: Quarterly FINRA/SEC filings; manual reconciliation; missed deadline = fines.
santifer_pattern: Transaction ingest + reg-templates + auto-filing + change-log

title: Board meeting prep: deck + minutes + action tracking
pain_description: Board book assembly = 3 days of document wrangling; minutes-to-action-tracking slips.
santifer_pattern: Doc ingest + exec-summary agent + action-item extractor + follow-up tracker

title: ESG / sustainability reporting (CSRD, SASB)
pain_description: 100+ data points across 15 business units; CSRD mandates narrative; manual Excel nightmare.
santifer_pattern: Data source connectors + narrative drafter + audit-ready report + filing agent

title: Export controls / trade compliance screening
pain_description: Every order: screen against BIS/OFAC; classify under ECCN; miss = $1M+ fine.
incumbent_gap: SAP-integrated; expensive; ECCN classification still manual
santifer_pattern: Product spec + HS/ECCN classifier + sanctions screen + audit log

title: Healthcare HIPAA audit prep + BAA tracking
persona: Compliance / privacy officer at clinic / hospital
pain_description: BAAs across 30 vendors expire; risk assessment annual; breach notifications manual.
santifer_pattern: BAA registry + expiry alerts + policy-gap agent + breach-notification drafter

title: Tax audit response: IRS/state notice handling
pain_description: IRS/state notice arrives; team pulls 3 years of ledgers; response drafted manually; interest accrues.
santifer_pattern: Notice parse + ledger RAG + precedent search + draft response + audit trail

title: Whistleblower / ethics hotline triage
pain_description: Reports mixed in severity; triage manual; investigation backlog; retaliation risk.
santifer_pattern: LLM sentiment + severity scoring + investigator routing + case workflow

title: Environmental permit tracking for industrial sites
pain_description: Air/water/waste permits across sites; annual reports; renewals; agency inspections.
santifer_pattern: Permit registry + deadline agent + report-drafter + inspection-ready docs

title: Financial crime investigation: case narrative writing
pain_description: Each SAR/STR needs 3-8 page narrative; investigator stitches from CRM + txn + open source. Hours per case.
santifer_pattern: Case pack + LLM narrative with citations + investigator edit + regulator-ready

title: FCRA background checks: dispute management
pain_description: Candidate disputes inaccurate record; FCRA 30-day reinvestigation; manual evidence gathering.
santifer_pattern: Dispute intake agent + source re-verify + resolution letter + compliance log

title: Clinical trial regulatory docs (IND/CTA/site docs)
pain_description: Site docs, protocol deviations, IRB correspondence - thousand-file set per trial; FDA submission manual.
santifer_pattern: Doc ingest + regulatory-template agent + deviation tracker + submission assembler

title: Pharmacovigilance: adverse event case processing
pain_description: Every AE report (narratives, MedDRA coding, causality) needs structured entry; huge volume.
santifer_pattern: Intake (email/form/voice) + narrative-to-MedDRA agent + causality draft + MedWatch filing

title: Due diligence Q&A response for founders
persona: Founder / COO during fundraise or M&A
pain_description: VC asks 200-question DD list; founder hunts past docs; 2-week distraction mid-fundraise.
santifer_pattern: Cap table + contracts + financials indexed + Q&A agent + reviewer workflow
